Transcrição Completa: 17 Day 17

 

[00:00]"You might in real time have a client that you hit up that might not want to talk to you about certain things. That might tell you things like, 'Hey, you know, I don't know if I want to give you that data, or you know, I don't want to talk to you about my revenue numbers, or uh I don't want to necessarily have you talk to me about my own social data and confirm whether it is or isn't true.'"

 

[00:25]"You know, you might have some people like that. Yet, those people aren't necessarily bad deals or weird. You know, your ability to have a higher sophistication to your communication is your ability to close those types of deals."

 

[00:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Legal Protection Tools"

 

NÚMEROS: Duas (2) diferentes acordos legais

 

VISUAL: Apresentação de documentos legais, NDA e contrato padrão, layout profissional com branding corporativo

 

[00:42]"Now, you're going to have the opportunity to be equipped with two different legal agreements. Okay? Number one, your NDA, standard NDA, non-disclosure agreement."

 

[00:53]"If somebody feels uncomfortable giving you any kind of information, download the non-disclosure agreement. Your NDA, if you put this, for example, to DocuSign, really easy objection to overcome."

 

[01:06] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "NDA Implementation Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Cenário de reunião presencial vs virtual, representação de documento sendo entregue através da mesa, interface DocuSign

 

[01:08]"If you're on the phone and somebody doesn't want to give you any kind of data, also you could have this in your handy-dandy book bag. When you show up to a meeting, if you're in person, you could slide across the table and say, 'Hey, no, I understand. Listen, you're a business owner. You have proprietary data. I don't necessarily want to push you on something that you don't want to talk to me about.'"

 

[01:33]"So, I brought an NDA along to represent that. I'm not going to disclose anything. If you have an NDA on file within your organization, I'd be happy to look at it and sign it as well. Whatever makes you feel comfortable in order for us to move along together today."

 

[01:49] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "DocuSign NDA Process"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Interface DocuSign, campos editáveis destacados, áreas para preenchimento de empresa e endereços, template estruturado

 

[01:51]"In DocuSign, it's very simple. You go through it. Nothing inside of the NDA is anything you have to change. There's just open areas where you can type in your company, your addresses. Things are very clear within the NDA. This is more of a template. This isn't a word doc, right?"

 

[02:09]"You have an opportunity to go download this. Now, because this is day 17, you might be closing some deals. Some deals happen right away. Some deals happen a little longer."

 

[02:19] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Standard Agreement Customization"

 

NÚMEROS: Day 17

 

VISUAL: Documento Word com branding personalizado, headers e footers editáveis, cores universais modificáveis, imagem corporativa

 

[02:22]"Now, in this agreement, you'll see it's branded for my organization. This is one of the assets that I give you guys the opportunity to download. What you're going to want to do here, swap out your branding. It's very easy in Word just to simply change the universal color for each one of the headers."

 

[02:40]"Then go through, actually read it and see where it says what type of money, you know, understand where the addresses are, understand where to list your payment types."

 

[02:48] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Agreement Structure Overview"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Documento Word completo, headers e footers destacados, campos editáveis marcados, estrutura de serviços listada, áreas de personalização identificadas

 

[02:50]"You'll see within this entire agreement, there's headers and footers for my organization. Everything because this is a Word document is editable. So you have an opportunity to go in here. It's a simple header, simple footer, all removable, one image, and with one change, you can change it all in this entire agreement."

 

[03:08]"It's pretty simple. Change the name of the client, change the price, change the time of your agreement itself, and just go through and list your services."

 

[03:16] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Services Documentation"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Lista de serviços com explicações detalhadas, formato copy-paste, estrutura de descrição de serviços

 

[03:18]"This is a copy and paste of the services that we have, and then explanations of each one. So, in real time, when you're standard agreement here, you have an opportunity to understand that whenever you're going to close a deal, you don't ever want to take money. You want to define what it is you're going to do."

 

[03:37]"You want to explain in detail the specifics of when, what, and how everything's going to be done. You want to go into detail. You can look up what's called an SOW. So, you want to Google SOW business define."

 

[03:51] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Day 17 Action Items"

 

NÚMEROS: 100 (meta de prospecção), Day 17

 

VISUAL: Checklist de ações, meta numérica destacada, proteção legal completa indicada

 

[03:54]"But all that aside, it is day 17. You need to go hit your 100. Now, you're covered legally."

 

[04:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Tomorrow's Preview: Creative Follow-up Videos"

 

NÚMEROS: Day 18 (implícito), 100 contatos

 

VISUAL: Preview do próximo dia, ícones de celular e redes sociais, lista de contatos, Facebook destacado, estratégia de vídeo follow-up

 

[04:04]"I'm going to talk to you tomorrow. We're going to go over creative follow-up videos that you're going to be able to use because you should be gathering some cell phones. You should have some emails. You may have some social media handles for all these different people that you're communicating with."

 

[04:21]"If you do not, be prepared for tomorrow by coming prepared with a list, all the cells, all the names of the cell phones. Hopefully, you have a backup of all their different social medias, preferably Facebook, so you can drop some videos to them."

 

[04:35]"And I want to show you how you're gonna be able to do a lot with that phone in your pocket."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Dia 17 do programa de treinamento

Meta de 100 contatos/prospecções

2 acordos legais fornecidos (NDA + Contrato Padrão)

Preview do Dia 18 focado em follow-up criativo

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Superação de Objeções de Confidencialidade: Uso estratégico de NDA para quebrar resistência de clientes que não querem compartilhar dados financeiros ou proprietários

Implementação Dual (Presencial/Virtual): NDA pode ser usado tanto em reuniões presenciais (entregue fisicamente) quanto em chamadas remotas (via DocuSign)

Flexibilidade Legal: Oferecer assinar o NDA do próprio cliente se ele preferir

Documentação Detalhada: Criar contratos que especifiquem when, what, how de cada serviço

SOW (Statement of Work): Recomendação de pesquisar e implementar estrutura SOW para definição clara de escopo

Preparação para Follow-up: Coleta sistemática de células, emails e handles de redes sociais (preferência Facebook)

 

ESTRUTURA:

Toolkit Legal Completo:

NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement) editável

Contrato Padrão de Serviços customizável

Elementos Editáveis do Contrato:

Branding (cores, headers, footers)

Nome do cliente

Preço/valores

Duração do acordo

Lista de serviços com explicações

Endereços

Tipos de pagamento

Sistema de Customização:

Documentos em Word totalmente editáveis

Template pronto para copy-paste

Mudança universal de cores com um clique

Uma imagem corporativa facilmente substituível

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não especificados valores específicos neste módulo

Foco em proteção legal antes de aceitar pagamentos

Ênfase em definir valores no contrato antes de receber dinheiro

 

DURAÇÃO: ~4:40 minutosFORMATO: Vídeo educacional de treinamento em vendas - Dia 17 de programa estruturado, focado em ferramentas legais e preparação para fechamento de negócios
